body: Colors would make the output of many commands with a lot of text much more readable. E.g. 'list': show ticketname, prio, state, title, label and note-count with different colors. 'show': use same colors in the header (name, prio, state, title), and when listing the events, show date, note#, username, kind and body with different colors.
title: use colors for human-designated output
